data.body: Fix max-lines, max-lines-per-function, and max-len ESLint warnings in dialog and settings components. Extract sub-components or helpers. Files: beat-form.tsx, beat-detail.tsx, beat-metadata-details.tsx, create-beat-dialog.tsx, merge-beats-dialog.tsx, move-to-project-dialog.tsx, notes-dialog.tsx, retake-dialog.tsx, settings-agents-section.tsx, settings-defaults-section.tsx, settings-dispatch-section.tsx, settings-dispatch-global-swap.tsx, settings-pools-section.tsx, settings-sheet.tsx
data.title: Fix code style: components/dialogs-and-settings
